title: Odyssey, Book 3: At the Court of Nestor
description: Book 3 of Homer's Odyssey: At the Court of Nestor.
introduction: Book 3 of the Odyssey: At the Court of Nestor. The Greek text follows the standard Homeric vulgate.

translation.text: The sun rose from the beautiful lake. Telemachus arrived at Pylos and found Nestor sacrificing to Poseidon. The old king told him of the Greeks' homecomings — of Agamemnon's murder by Clytemnestra and Aegisthus, of Menelaus's wanderings. But of Odysseus he knew nothing. He sent Telemachus onward to Sparta.
